candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Consider the capacitor shown in the figure. The capacitance $C(t)$ is given by $C_0 (1 + 0.5 \sin t)$. The voltage across this capacitor is given by $v(t) = 2 \sin wt$. Find the current through the capacitor.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 考虑如图所示的电容器。电容量 $C(t)$ 由 $C(t) = C_0(1 + 0.5 \sin t)$ 给出,其中 $C_0$ 为常数。该电容器两端的电压由 $v(t) = 2 \sin \omega t$ 给出。求通过该电容器的电流 $i(t)$。
